data.title: SingularityNET Introduces ASI Hub to Secure Generation of AI Agent Identities
data.description:
TL;DR SingularityNET and Mind Network have announced a strategic partnership to develop ASI Hub, a new decentralized infrastructure aimed at enhancing security and privacy in artificial intelligence (AI) systems. This advancement seeks to address two of the biggest challenges in the field of decentralized AI: secure agent identification and verifiable randomness. SingularityNET ASI Hub...
source: https://crypto-economy.com/singularitynet-introduces-asi-hub-to-secure-generation-of-ai-agent-identities/

data.title: Elon Musk’s D.O.G.E to fire hundreds of high-level Department of Homeland Security employees
data.description:
According to an NBC News report, the Trump administration is removing hundreds of top Department of Homeland Security (DHS) officials this week in what is described as a targeted purge of high-ranking career employees. Of course, this is led by Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (D.O.G.E), which has taken control of federal workforce reductions […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/d-o-g-e-to-fire-homeland-security-employees/

data.title: Bitcoin and gold draw closer as correlation with dollar and equities weakens
data.description:
There has been a significant shift in how closely Bitcoin (BTC) moves alongside traditional equity indices compared to earlier months. The correlation with the Nasdaq and the S&P 500, which had been relatively strong through much of 2024, shows a slight but consistent decline going into late 2024 and 2025. Part of the reason for […]
